## Docker Images

Multi-arch images (`linux/amd64`, `linux/arm64`) published to **GitHub Container Registry** and **Docker Hub**:

| Profile | GHCR | Docker Hub |
|---|---|---|
| `full` *(default, `latest` alias)* | `ghcr.io/pazter1101/resilum:full-{{version}}` | `pazter1101/resilum:full-{{version}}` |
| `covert` (Tor + obfs4 + email/ICMP/DNS) | `ghcr.io/pazter1101/resilum:covert-{{version}}` | `pazter1101/resilum:covert-{{version}}` |
| `mesh` (Yggdrasil + I2P) | `ghcr.io/pazter1101/resilum:mesh-{{version}}` | `pazter1101/resilum:mesh-{{version}}` |
| `lora` (Reticulum + LoRa only) | `ghcr.io/pazter1101/resilum:lora-{{version}}` | `pazter1101/resilum:lora-{{version}}` |

### Usage
```bash
docker compose --profile headless up
```
